title: Update sync script and install skill

log.context: Update sync script and install skill

All three steps done. Here's a summary:

**What the script looked like before:**
It only looped over `settings.json` and `settings.local.json`, copying each from `$STAGING` (`/mnt/data/claude-config`) to `$DEST` (`~/.claude`) if they existed. There was no handling of subdirectories.

**What was added:**
A block at the end that checks if `$STAGING/skills` exists and, if so, runs `rsync -a "$STAGING/skills/" "$DEST/skills/"` to mirror the entire skills directory into `~/.claude/skills/`.
